mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, due_date, priority, done FROM todo ORDER BY CASE WHEN due_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, due_date, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo (title, description, due_date, priority, done) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{dueDate}, #{priority}, #{done})
mapper.update: UPDATE todo SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, due_date = #{dueDate}, priority = #{priority}, done = #{done} WHERE id = #{id}
